_comment: guides: keyed by month number (1-12). If a month has no entry, 'default' (The Bright Pages evergreen guide) is used. did_you_know rotates weekly.

7.label: The Almanac
7.title: Your 4th of July in Celebration
7.body: The complete, no-stress guide to Independence Day around town — where to catch the fireworks, the parade route, family-friendly cookouts, and the spots that book up fast. Save it, share it, plan around it.

10.label: The Almanac
10.title: Halloween in Celebration
10.body: Trick-or-treat maps, the best-decorated streets, family events, and where to grab the cutest costumes in town.

12.label: The Almanac
12.title: The Holidays in Celebration
12.body: Now Snowing on Market Street, tree lightings, holiday markets, and the can't-miss lights — your whole December, sorted.

default.label: The Bright Pages
default.title: The Newcomer's Guide to Celebration
default.body: New to town or just love it here? The essential local handbook — the best eats, the parks, the must-knows, and the little secrets that make Celebration home.

did_you_know.headline: Celebration was dreamed up by Disney back in 1996.
did_you_know.body: And every December, Market Street still "snows" on the hour — soap-foam flurries and all. Now you've got something to say at the cookout. 😉

did_you_know.headline: Celebration sees about 233 sunny days a year.
did_you_know.body: That's roughly two out of every three. You're welcome.

did_you_know.headline: Celebration's downtown was designed to be fully walkable.
did_you_know.body: From the lakefront to Market Street, almost everything's a stroll away — by design.
